title: Saucony Men's Redeemer ISO Road Running Shoe
description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

title: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal Jogging Running Shoes Run Choose Size & Color (V29) (6.25" X 3.75", Blue)
description: This vinyl decal is made of high quality indoor/outdoor rated and proven Oracal 651 vinyl!! -These are perfect for car windows, skateboards, Ipads, etc. (Practically any smooth, clean surface) -A vinyl cut sticker means that there is no background or clear backing. Only the image is the adhesive part! -These are not Cling-ons. -Please apply only to a clean, dry surface. Below are some instructions on how to apply these cool stickers: Step 1 Rub the sticker with a credit card or something with a rigid surface to be sure the transfer tape is properly adhered to the sticker. Step 2 Clean and dry the desired area. Stickers will stick best to clean smooth surfaces. Step 3 Remove the paper backing slowly making sure the sticker stays adhered to the transparent transfer tape Step 4 Carefully position the sticker to the desired area. Once the sticker sticks it will be nearly impossible to reposition without destroying the sticker. Rub the sticker from one side to the other, eliminating any air bubbles. Step 5 Use a hard edged object like a credit card to make sure the entire sticker is fully adhered to the surface. Step 6 Slowly remove the transfer tape. Making sure no part of the sticker remains on the transfer tape. Step 7 Check for air bubbles. In most cases air bubbles can be worked to the edge of the sticker, but if not, a pin hole will allow the air out and become virtually invisible, once the bubble is gone. That’s it! Your sticker is now worry free. It will last through rain, sleet, snow and gentle washing's. You can remove the sticker from glass surfaces with a razor blade or in most cases a fingernail will get the removal process started.
features: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal
26.2 Marathon Girl Vinyl Sticker

title: Xero Shoes Men's HFS Running Shoes - Zero Drop, Lightweight & Barefoot Feel
features: A NEW LIGHTWEIGHT road running shoe. Foot-shaped for comfort. Built for speed!
Made in the USA or Imported
GRIP + COMFORT - Flexible to support natural foot motion, and grippy with its tire tread-inspired FeelTrue rubber sole

SHAPED FOR COMFORT, BUILT FOR SPEED - Xero HFS features a lightweight, minimalist build that contours to the shape of your feet. Its spacious toe-box allows you to splay, spread, and relax your toes for superior comfort
XERO DROP SOLE FOR PERFECT POSTURE - The Xero Drop sole offers a non-elevated heel and is low-to-the-ground - this allows for proper posture, balance, and agility for all-round performance

FLEX YOUR FEET, FEEL THE FLOOR - Our tire tread inspired patented 5.5mm FeelTrue sole strikes a balance between just-right protection and feedback - it delivers heel to toe cues to the brain for your best run ever. Allows your feet to bend and flex as nature intended

TRAVEL FRIENDLY, 5000 MILE WARRANTY - Xero HFS’ extra-durable construction is backed by our 5,000 Mile Feel the World Sole Promise. Being ultra-flexible, you can roll ‘em up and put in your pack or pocket for compact storage and easy travel
VEGAN FRIENDLY - Xero Shoes believes in promoting healthy and sustainable lifestyles which is why the HFS is made with zero animal products

reviews.title: Surpassed My Expectations
reviews.text: I feel like now I can write an honest review. I have run for years, 3 5k per week. My go to shoes were NB or Brooks and I loved them. Started seeing Xero Shoes pop up on social media and YouTube. I looked them for months and it seemed like a gimmick product. After some time I said ok I am going to try this shoe and see if they meet their hype. In July of this year I ordered the Prio Cross Trainer model. Now their instructions said adjust over a couple of weeks. Well I said hell no and put them to the test right out of the box. I wore them every chance I got for 30 days straight. I found them comfortable right out of the box and I did not experience any foot or leg discomfort during the break period. I began liking them the more I wore them. At day 31 I put my Brooks Adrenaline runners on. Within 15 mins I was aware of how unbalanced I was in that shoe and while walking around in my home said, I can’t wear these any more I have to put my Xero Shoes on. I swear I referred to them specifically. I have since purchased 2 pairs of the HFS model runners and they are my favorite shoe. I wear them every day. In my old shoes at the end of the day I would change to my slides, I literally have these on until I go to bed. Closest thing to walking barefoot and still having a shoe on.

reviews.title: If you like barefoot shoes give these a try.
reviews.text: I wear a size 11 in most running shoes. Ordered a 10 1/2 in this and it fits great. My feet are on wider side so shorter sizes work for me if the shoe is somewhat wide. Really comfortable and appears well made. I look forward to trying other models. Unlike many other barefoot manufacturers I didn’t see any irregularities in how the shoe was put together.

reviews.title: Comfortable as "bare foot" shoes
reviews.text: I have purchased 2 Xero Men's HFS Running Shoes - Zero Drop and I have been very happy and comfortable wearing them. I've successfully walked and run with them when I visited Philippines for a month and have gotten used to the "bare foot" concept. Although I'm still comfortable wearing my Adidas running shoes, I found myself to be wearing my bare foot shoes more often now as I really find them much lighter, comfortable (for bare foot shoes) and lighter/easier to pack on day or extended trips. I've only been wearing them for the last 2 months or so, so long term I would still need to see how they stand up.

reviews.title: Forms to feet
reviews.text: Really nice lightweight shoes that forms to feet rather than walking with slight incline on heel. One of the best work out shoes there are. Not for running or basket ball- in my opinion, though more for stretching, walking,  calisthenics, boxing or light aerobics.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 5 Running Shoes
description:
For the higher mileage runner looking for structured cushioning and support, the GT-2000 5 shoe features a FluidRide® midsole for exceptional bounce-back and cushioning. An added stitch-down toecap enhances durability and forefoot support.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Mesh/Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
I.G.S (Impact Guidance System) Technology: ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic DuoMax Support System: This evolution of DuoMax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidRide Midsole: FluidRide provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology: This Trusstic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: These run a size too small (Mens)
reviews.text: Received my new running shoes about 15 minutes ago from Amazon.  I was excited to use these shoes on a run and tried them on.  I have a narrow foot and wear an 11 in New Balance (based on 3 pairs of shoes), and every other brand except Salomon and Saucony that run small.  Well, these run small, really small.  My toe was touching the end of the shoe, and these were very tight and hard to get on (I have a narrow foot!).  These are lightweight, look good, and appear to be somewhat well made.  The soles look like they are cheaper foam, and don't really have a running shoe tread.  Not sure how long they would last, but at the under forty dollar price when marked down, not a bad deal.  I would expect to get at least 200 miles on pavement running out of these.

features: Improve Running Speed and Safety: Running or sports enthusiast, you must not miss this Track Spikes! This pyramid spikes will add the friction between the shoe sole and ground, thus can resist skid and improve your running speed.

Quality Spikes for Track Shoes : Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Providing long servicing life.These spikes are suitable for all athletic tracks, and field or cross country surfaces,help you get better grades.

Small Spikes Size : Perfect size 1/4"extra track spikes, full length is 0.5”(12.8mm), pyramid needle design, spike wrench size 2"*1.8". Easy to match with most of the track shoes, bring you superior traction, strength and durability
Widely Usage : The spikes provide optimal grip for track and field or dry terrain in cross-country, ideal for track sprints, long jump, running, outdoor sports activities

Enough Quantity Spikes : Package include 110 pieces pyramid track spikes with 1 pieces spike wrench and 1 pieces transparent storage box, easy to carry and convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.

reviews.title: Cheap price, cheap product
reviews.text:
Lots of the spikes I received were malformed. They were too round to fit the wrench key that came with them so I couldn't screw them in. At least one of them is stuck and I am unsure if I will be able to remove it.

I would suggest going with something else.

title: Nike Women's Running Shoe
description: Nike Women's Enigma Nike Shox Black/Black/Gym Red BQ9001-001
features: Rubber sole

reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

reviews.text: recommended for painful Plantar Fasciitis . I ordered these for that reason, and pretty much wear them all the time.

title: NORTIV 8 Men's Cushioned Trail Running Shoes Rubber Sole Non Slip Lightweight Lace Up Walking Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole
Breathable Upper: These men’s trail running shoes are built with a mesh fabric upper, ensuring maximum air circulation for all-day freshness.
Cushioned Footsteps: Designed with a lightweight and shock-absorbent MD midsole, these casual sneakers power each step, reducing impact and pressure on the feet.
Safe Design: These shoes feature reflective strips on the upper, keeping you walking or running more safely in the dark.
Greater Stability: These casual shoes boast a textured and patterned rubber oustole for greater wear-resistance and stability. Run or walk with ease in the park or on roads.
Optimum Comfort: A mesh-covered PU insole and padded collar bring cushioning and added comfort, suitable for everyday wear, sport, casual walks and beyond.

reviews.title: Solid looking hiking trail running shoes
reviews.text: These are nice looking, solid, strong and sturdy trail running shoes. Feel comfortable while trail-walking or running. Only advice is buy a half size bigger. 9.5 usually fits me well but this one was tight and Inhad to go for size 10

reviews.title: Nice running shoes
reviews.text: Good fit. Nice comfortable shoe. Works great

reviews.title: Runs a bit small, but a pretty average shoe, otherwise
reviews.text: I'll keep this pretty short: the shoe is serviceable; that's about it. It's neither particularly comfortable or uncomfortable; it's just a shoe with no outstanding qualities, pretty comparable in quality and feel to the $20 shoes you'd get at "the blue and yellow store". Mine ran on the small side, about a half size under, I would say, but they fit (without cramming my toes in), so I'll use them for outdoor work come spring and summer.

title: ASICS Men's GlideRide 3 Running Shoes
features: 100% Synthetic
Rubber sole
3D print details: Strategically positioned throughout the upper to improve stability
Jacquard mesh upper: Creates a softer feel against the foot while improving breathability

GUIDESOLE Technology: The curved sole design and stiff forefoot of our GUIDESOLE technology reduce ankle flexion and provide a shock-absorbent landing zone to lessen fatigue of other leg muscles and increase runner efficiency.
FF BLAST cushioning: Creates a softer feeling at foostrike and a more responsive rebound
FLYTEFOAM Propel Technology: ASICS energetic foam formulation that provides supreme bounce thanks to a unique elastomer compound.

reviews.title: Significantly smaller fit than GR2
reviews.text: I don't understand how the fit can be so different between generations, but it's just too small.  The outside dimensions look the same, but what looks like happened is the new foam is encroaching on the upper and there's just not enough room for your foot in there.  Returned.  Sad, because I liked the Glideride 2 and expected a better shoe, and a similar fitting shoe.

title: Nike Women's Odyssey React Flyknit 2 Mesh Running Shoes (7.5, Gunsmoke/Laser Fucia)
features: Mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Order a sizes up!
reviews.text: These shoes are very pretty but they are way too tight. I normally wear a 7 in women but I had to order half a size up which was still too small.

reviews.title: Uncomfortable
reviews.text: Hate them. They’re so uncomfortable. Maybe I should have ordered bigger than my normal size.. but length wise they weren’t horrible. It was width and toe size. Ick.

reviews.title: Nice sneakers... but deformed I want to say.
reviews.text: Runs super small. Even if u go a size up ... it’s still going to be tight on the sides and huge on the foot in front.

title: New Balance Men's FuelCore Coast V4 Running Shoe
description:
Whether you're running at the gym or wearing on the streets, the new fuel core coast V4 unites convenience and comfort for the ultimate everyday athletic shoe. The ground contact eva outsole creates a lightweight ride while bootie construction has a second-skin feel and is easy to slip on and go.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
Laser Engraving
NB Response 2.0 Performance Insert
Bootie Construction
Synthetic/Mesh Upper

reviews.title: Love them!
reviews.text: Light weight with a great fit. Perfect for travel or day to day wear.  They handled a solid day of walking around city streets in comfort.  I’m ordering another pair in a different color.

reviews.title: Super Light weight
reviews.text: The style, color and the lightweight of the material and sole make a perfect shoe. We will see in time if they stand up to my husbands daily regime at the gym.

reviews.title: Great running and walking shoe
reviews.text: Wonderful product, fit perfectly, wash in washing machine NOT HOT WATER, warm or cold so glued parts do not come apart. They wash many, many times with no ill effects.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Comfortable, fit well, sharp looking.

title: Mountain Warehouse Path Mens Walking Shoes - Waterproof Running Shoes
description: The Path Waterproof Mens Walking Shoes are a great choice for summer walking. Made with a water resistant upper and sturdy soles with a deep tread for extra grip and stability. Breathable mesh lining helps keep feet fresh and a cushioned footbed offers support and comfort when out hiking or as an everyday walking shoe.Waterproof - Constructed of water resistant upper and waterproof membraneMesh Lining - Improves breathability to help keep your feet fresh whilst out and aboutDeep Lugs - Adds extra grip and stability to the soleCushioned Footbed - Supports your foot for added comfort, particularly at the arch and toeHeel and Toe Bumpers - Added rubber reinforcement at heel and toe, makes your footwear last longer Ref: 053040

Rubber sole
Waterproof - constructed of a water-resistant upper and waterproof membrane
Mesh Lining - Improves breathability to help keep your feet fresh whilst out and about
High traction outsole - Adds extra grip, support and stability to the sole
EVA cushioning - Moulds to your foot providing support & comfort

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: I bought these for my boyfriend’s birthday. He has another pair of floatrides and I was trying to find the exact pair but couldn’t. He love these even more. I might get the red pair too. True to size.
